commands.review_summary:
The PR adds bounded retry recovery for transient memory-wiki imported-page path mismatches and coalesces equivalent concurrent bridge imports through index refresh.

PR surface: Source +131, Tests +233. Total +364 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main contains both the uncoalesced concurrent path and the propagated fs-safe path-mismatch path, while the PR supplies deterministic hook-based coverage and live gateway output for the failures.
commands.review_followup: - The PR appears ready for ordinary maintainer review and landing; no automated repair is needed.

target.title: Harden memory wiki bridge imports
target.body:
## Summary

- Add bounded retry handling for transient `FsSafeError: path-mismatch` while writing imported memory-wiki source pages.
- Coalesce concurrent bridge imported-source syncs for the same vault/config through index refresh while keying on bridge artifact-discovery inputs such as `agents.defaults.workspace`.
- Preserve existing vault safety boundaries for symlink/path-alias and directory collision cases.

Related to #91154.

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:** Local memory-wiki bridge imports no longer run duplicate imported-source sync/import passes for concurrent callers of the same vault/config, the shared sync covers downstream index refresh under gateway load, the coalescing key separates callers with different default workspaces, and imported source page writes retry transient fs-safe `path-mismatch` without weakening existing symlink/path safety checks.

**Environment tested:** Linux worktree at `/media/vdb/migrated-from-root-media-vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/issue-91154`, Node 22.22.0, pnpm 11.2.2. Verification used local filesystem-backed memory-wiki vault/workspace fixtures only; no external channel credentials or live Feishu/Slack/IRC transport were used.

**Command run after the patch:**

```bash
PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false corepack pnpm@11.2.2 --dir /media/vdb/migrated-from-root-media-vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/issue-91154 exec vitest run extensions/memory-wiki/src/source-page-shared.test.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/bridge.test.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/source-sync.test.ts
PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false corepack pnpm@11.2.2 --dir /media/vdb/migrated-from-root-media-vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/issue-91154 exec oxlint extensions/memory-wiki/src/source-page-shared.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/source-page-shared.test.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/bridge.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/bridge.test.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/source-sync.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/source-sync.test.ts
PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false corepack pnpm@11.2.2 --dir /media/vdb/migrated-from-root-media-vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/issue-91154 exec oxfmt --check extensions/memory-wiki/src/source-page-shared.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/source-page-shared.test.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/bridge.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/bridge.test.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/source-sync.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/source-sync.test.ts
PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false corepack pnpm@11.2.2 --dir /media/vdb/migrated-from-root-media-vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/issue-91154 exec tsx /media/vdb/migrated-from-root-media-vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-issue-91154-evidence/memory-wiki-bridge-local-proof.mjs
PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false corepack pnpm@11.2.2 --dir /media/vdb/migrated-from-root-media-vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/issue-91154 exec tsx /media/vdb/migrated-from-root-media-vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-issue-91154-evidence/memory-wiki-gateway-load-proof.mjs
```

**Evidence after fix:**

```text
RUN  v4.1.7 /media/vdb/migrated-from-root-media-vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/issue-91154

Test Files  3 passed (3)
     Tests  18 passed (18)
  Start at  15:47:13
  Duration  17.23s
```

```json
{
  "behavior": "memory-wiki imported-source local proof",
  "concurrentImportedSourceListings": 1,
  "settledImportedSourceListings": 2,
  "totalImportedSourceListingsAfterSafetyCheck": 3,
  "initialImportedCount": 1,
  "initialIngestLogCount": 1,
  "settledRerunSkippedCount": 1,
  "symlinkRefused": true,
  "symlinkTargetPreserved": true,
  "vaultDir": "/tmp/openclaw-91154-proof-bsy7BI/vault",
  "workspaceDir": "/tmp/openclaw-91154-proof-bsy7BI/workspace",
  "script": "/media/vdb/migrated-from-root-media-vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-issue-91154-evidence/memory-wiki-bridge-local-proof.mjs"
}
```

```json
{
  "behavior": "memory-wiki gateway load proof",
  "gatewayMethods": [
    "wiki.palace",
    "wiki.importInsights",
    "wiki.status"
  ],
  "concurrentGatewayCalls": 60,
  "bridgeArtifactCount": 13,
  "syncBridgeArtifactListings": 1,
  "statusPublicArtifactListings": 20,
  "totalPublicArtifactListings": 21,
  "bridgeSourcePages": 13,
  "ingestLogCount": 1,
  "compileLogCount": 1,
  "palaceResponses": 20,
  "importInsightResponses": 20,
  "statusResponses": 20,
  "statusBridgeSourceCount": 13,
  "vaultDir": "/tmp/openclaw-91154-gateway-load-GRie1r/vault",
  "workspaceDir": "/tmp/openclaw-91154-gateway-load-GRie1r/workspace",
  "script": "/media/vdb/migrated-from-root-media-vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-issue-91154-evidence/memory-wiki-gateway-load-proof.mjs"
}
```

```text
oxlint completed with no findings for:
- extensions/memory-wiki/src/source-page-shared.ts
- extensions/memory-wiki/src/source-page-shared.test.ts
- extensions/memory-wiki/src/bridge.ts
- extensions/memory-wiki/src/bridge.test.ts
- extensions/memory-wiki/src/source-sync.ts
- extensions/memory-wiki/src/source-sync.test.ts
```

```text
oxfmt --check: All matched files use the correct format.
```

**Observed result after fix:** Concurrent imported-source sync callers shared a single in-flight import pass (`concurrentImportedSourceListings: 1`) and still returned the imported bridge page. A settled follow-up sync performed a fresh listing and skipped the unchanged page. The production-path proof also replaced the imported page with a vault symlink and confirmed the sync was refused while the symlink target remained unchanged. The gateway-load proof exercised the production gateway registration path with 60 concurrent `wiki.palace`, `wiki.importInsights`, and `wiki.status` calls against 13 local bridge artifacts; the shared imported-source sync produced exactly one bridge import listing, one ingest log, and one compile log while all 60 gateway responses succeeded and `wiki.status` observed 13 bridge source pages. The focused regression tests cover the transient `path-mismatch` retry path, confirm the imported page body plus sync state are written after retry, verify a recovered bridge page write is counted as an import (`importedCount: 1`, `skippedCount: 0`), confirm concurrent bridge imported-source sync plus index refresh is coalesced for the same vault, and confirm concurrent bridge syncs stay separate when `agents.defaults.workspace` differs.

**What was not tested:** This does not claim a full #91154 product-policy resolution. It does not test live Feishu/Slack/IRC or any other non-local channel transport, RSS import spirals, broader batching/backpressure policy beyond same-vault gateway coalescing, partial-failure product behavior, or maintainer-only load environments. Full-repo `tsc --noEmit --pretty false` was attempted earlier but the local process was terminated by the environment after heap/OOM pressure, so the passing checks here are the focused Vitest, targeted oxlint, targeted oxfmt check, and local production-path proofs above.
